task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into HospitalRun.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun dashboard or main application interface is visible, showing the user is authenticated.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Reports section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reports' module or page is open in the HospitalRun UI.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the 'Diagnostic' report type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, radio button, or menu shows 'Diagnostic' selected as the type of report to generate.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct date range for January 2025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start date input field shows '01/01/2025' (or equivalent Jan 1, 2025 format) and the end date input field shows '01/31/2025' (or equivalent Jan 31, 2025 format).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent generated the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated report view, table, or print preview is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the report displays the expected diagnosis data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The generated report explicitly contains the text 'Pneumonia', 'Diabetes', and 'Hypertension'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the HospitalRun graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and HospitalRun UI, rather than terminal commands querying the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the report is displayed in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report results are shown within the HospitalRun application layout or its native print/export view, not in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually type the expected answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagnosis names (Pneumonia, Diabetes, Hypertension) appear as rendered data in the report table/list, not typed into a search bar, input field, or blank document by the agent.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected report type is 'Diagnostic'. The date range must be exactly Start Date: 01/01/2025 and End Date: 01/31/2025. The generated report must display the following specific diagnoses: Pneumonia, Diabetes, and Hypertension. Do not expect M54.5 as it is not part of the generated data.
